'''Nave Vengaris''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as the [[Governor/Legends|governess]] of [[Aquilaris]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. She welcomed the income and boosted tourism which accompanied [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] and granted the use of [[Floating City]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], as part of the race course.<ref name="OPG" /> However, after the rise of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] banned the sport.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] {{1st}}
